name: Alexandra
subject: What will they think of next!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

It's almost Father's Day and the Rand Paul Store has a really cool idea for the father in your life who supports Rand. Yes, it's time for the Rand Paul turtleneck!

If you haven't seen Rand wearing his famous turtleneck look, **[see this article that called him the 'best dressed man in Washington' (perhaps tongue-in-cheek)](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28266046:27147134851:m:1:879035888:AB28D63ADEB358794B6088250D3D4C12:r)**.

In addition, there are t-shirts, can coolers, socks, baseball caps and even a camping chair.

**[See all the gifts by clicking here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28266047:27147134851:m:1:879035888:AB28D63ADEB358794B6088250D3D4C12:r)**.

Is there anything better than giving your Dad a great gift that also helps the Rand Paul for President campaign? We think not.

Join us in giving a big salute to the Fathers of America and electing Rand Paul!

In Liberty,

Alexandra

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28266048:27147134851:m:1:879035888:AB28D63ADEB358794B6088250D3D4C12:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28266049:27147134851:m:1:879035888:AB28D63ADEB358794B6088250D3D4C12:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28266050:27147134851:m:1:879035888:AB28D63ADEB358794B6088250D3D4C12:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President

Peter,

Today is the last chance to take advantage of our lapel pin offer. Contribute $3 or more before midnight and we will send you a special edition Our American Revival lapel pin._

Your contribution will help us in our fight to enact big, bold reforms across the country - like those Governor Walker has been able to implement in Wisconsin. Stand with us as we fight to take power away from the federal government and return it to the American people.

[**REQUEST YOUR PIN >>>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3OTAzMTIS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwNjI1Mjc1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
